patch.value: Track the July 6, 2026 fleet pass: align package metadata with latest pm CLI/SDK and pm-changelog, verify daily release automation, run build/test/audit/package checks with real workspace data where practical, inspect GitHub state, and record privacy/history findings without changing pm-cli itself.
July 6, 2026 fleet readiness pass for the pm package ecosystem.
Package uses current pm CLI/SDK and pm-changelog; release/check scripts pass; pm items capture decisions; no tracked secrets/private data are introduced; GitHub PR/release state is reviewed.

value.author: codex
value.text: PR #20 clean verification (2026-07-10): npm ci + build passed; test suite passed 80/80 at PR head. Functional throwaway install passed: pm --help returned within timeout; --format svg emitted a self-contained 1600px SVG; --width applied to SVG/HTML and clamped safely; --show-progress matched --progress byte-for-byte; malformed width/format/milestone inputs exited 2 with clean errors/no stack traces; default no-new-flags output matched origin/main byte-for-byte (4,147 bytes). Bot audit found two unreplied valid Gemini comments: historical canvas growth concern was already fixed in 0e4bce1; final-week progress labels could clip. Fixed the latter in 26bdeb4 by reserving right padding and adding regression coverage; rebuilt suite passes 81/81. Reacted +1 and replied to both threads; posted one combined bot re-review request. PR is merge-ready pending refreshed checks/reviews.
